so how does tawil actually work as a DPS trying to figure her out right now

you use her 2 cost wings of time, it shuffles wings unfurled into your deck 
it's basically an evolution/step by step thing
Her whole mechanic is that she gains new cards when using her 2cost card
where each wing card shuffles the next step
Then repeatedly till her six wing, which is the 6 hit damage card

it goes from 
 wings of time (attack buff + an inspiration card) ->  wings unfurled (gain energy aka aliemus) ->  four wings unleashed (damage reduction + attack buff) ->  six wings unleashed (you choose a buff from the story chapter to apply)
they all cost 2 arithmetica (mana) to play, and each draw you a card, with 6 wings being the outlier as it doesn't draw and doesn't shuffle anything into the deck

On top of hitting 6 times on that card you can choose effect out of 6 option
Discard and redraw cards
Barrier
Damage 15% to enemy
I forgot the other but yeah
Upon using each the option will no longer be used on that ~~fight~~ exploration

However, in V2.1, due to the introduction of the “Star Chapter” battle rule change, we'll be significantly adjusting and streamlining the design of Molten Tide to make it more lenient and friendly, not just with negative effects, but also with more positive opportunities.

Looking Ahead: V2.1 Leveling Chapter

Of course, enemy life and damage will be adjusted based on the new environment, and they will be easier to deal with overall. Our goal is to have more chances and possibilities to defeat the enemies even if the Keeper of the Secrets doesn't use those few teams with extremely strong combo effects.

Please note that all of this is just a prospective effect in current development, and we will likely make further adjustments in subsequent development tests, so please refer to the announcement when it is live.

Berserk Reversal: When the Evoking Body releases Berserk Burst, it gains 1 Tier of “Reversal”, increasing the amount of Berserk required to release Berserk Burst by 20 points. At the end of the turn, if the Evoker did not release a Berserk Burst this turn, it removes all Backdrafts, and for each Tier of Backdrafts removed, it gains 1 Berserk equal to the Berserk Recharge.

Prismatic Lens: Poisoning, Counterattack, and Bleeding effects dealt by us based on the amount of damage dealt will no longer be affected by Blast Damage. All Poison, Counter, and Bleed effects dealt by us are increased by 20%.

High Dimensional Insight: After the leader has taken a certain percentage of damage per turn, it is immune to this overflow and reduces all subsequent damage taken in the turn by 50%, halving the chance of being hit by a bludgeon and the bonus to bludgeon damage. The first 3 damage taken by the Primarch each turn is increased by 100%.

Primordial Gaze: All non-Chief, non-Elite, and non-Summoned enemies change their Intent to “Gaze” each turn at the start of Round 6, adding a random Symptom to your library. At the beginning of Round 5, these enemies will also bleed themselves for 30% of their current life each turn.

content: oh no not for the tier list, the changes

**【Level Chapter】**

As mentioned before, the level chapter allows us to better maintain balance in long-term updates. But its role is not only that. The level chapter is essentially equivalent to bringing a new annual level mode to the game, so that various decisions during the game become meaningful again, and it will also bring a new experience.

- **Forget Chapter**: The old one-time levels launched in the past, a small number of Dream Deep Dive, and Melt Disaster Forbidden Zone levels will be marked as "Forget Chapter" on the interface.

- **Star Chapter**: The new investigation levels launched in the future, most of the Dream Deep Dive, and Melt Disaster Forbidden Zone levels will be marked as "Star Chapter" on the interface.
- **Chapter Differences**: Different chapters have a lot of rule differences in exploration, creation, awakening, engraving, black seal, death resistance, computing power, playing cards, number of rounds, etc.

**【Star Chapter·Creation】**

The pricing, effects, mechanisms, and classification of creations in the "Star Chapter" will be different from those in the "Forgetting Chapter". We have readjusted and streamlined the general creations according to the latest environment to make the role positioning of each creation clearer and worthy of being chosen. Finally, we have also introduced new and extremely rare awakened body exclusive creations. Each awakened body has the opportunity to gain new abilities during exploration to make the construction growth experience more surprising. We will continue to add new general creations and exclusive creations with subsequent version updates!

- **General Creations**: After readjustment, 48 general creations may appear in the level. The effects, quality, and prices of the same creation may be different in different chapters.
- The Joy of Luo Yan (Forgetting Chapter): When active damage is caused in each round, a certain amount of tentacle damage is increased in this round, up to 3 times stacked. Generates 1 temporary tentacle when full.
- Loyan's Joy (Stars): Use Raging Stance to immediately activate all tentacles to attack the enemy once, 3 turns cooldown.

- **Exclusive Creations**: Each awakened entity introduces an exclusive Creature, which may appear at a low probability in the level when it is used in battle.
- Ramona: At the start of the turn, Ramona gains 15 Madness. Every 3rd time you play Ramona's Command Card, the Command Card will take effect 1 additional time.
- Rotan: At the start of the turn, Rotan gains 15 Madness. After playing Rotan's "Defense" for the first time each turn, place 2 "Desperate Blades" with additional cost and nothingness into your hand.
- Dor: At the start of the turn, Dor gains 15 Madness. After the battle starts, the calculation cost of Dor's "Equivalent Exchange" becomes 0, and after playing it, draw 2 additional cards in the next turn.
- Ogier: At the start of the turn, Ogier gains 15 Madness. After playing Ogier's "Piercing Lance" for the first time each round, Ogier's shield and strength in this round will be increased by 50%.

The effects of counterattack and poisoning creations will have a stronger combination effect in their own style, and basic damage creations have been added to support teams with high basic damage.
- Alien Mouthpiece (Star Chapter): "Strike" causes 10% of damage poisoning, which can be triggered up to 3 times per round.
- Arcana Relic (Star Chapter): When playing a card with lower computing power cost than the previous card for 2 consecutive times, a certain amount of poison is applied to all enemies, which can be triggered up to 3 times per round.
- Laser Jaw (Star Chapter): After releasing the Madness Burst, all enemies will receive 1 fixed damage of 15% of the team's maximum health and trigger 10% poisoning.
- Dusted Sewing Machine (Astral): At the start of combat, gain 100 Realm Mastery, and increase the poison caused by all awakened entities and the poison caused by creations by 25%.
- Weeping Pipe (Astral): Increase the base damage caused by all awakened entities by 50%/100%.
- Evil Child (Astral): At the start of combat, apply 1 stack of Weakness to all enemies, double the effect in boss battles. Increase the base damage caused by all awakened entities by 25%.
- Rite of Spring (Astral): At the start of combat, apply 1 stack of Vulnerability to all enemies, double the effect in boss battles. Increase the base damage caused by all awakened entities by 25%.

**[Starry Sky·Silver Key Awakening]**

In "Starry Sky", we re-examined the role of Key Orders and Spiritual Awakening, and introduced a new "Silver Key Awakening" mechanism. We once hoped that Spiritual Awakening would be selective throughout the exploration process, and Key Orders could be strategically stored and released, but it is obvious that this has become increasingly difficult as the environment gradually changes. "Silver Key Awakening" will allow you to awaken without spending Black Seals or other exploration resources, but you will need to use more Silver Key Energy to obtain the Spiritual Awakening Card of the awakened body in battle.

- **Triggering method**: Before using the Key Order, you can choose to give up using the Key Order and use "Silver Key Awakening" to place the Spiritual Awakening card of the designated awakened body into your hand, which will be effective in this battle. "Silver Key Awakening" can only trigger 1 năm per round.
- **Silver Key Overload**: When used repeatedly in the same battle, 100%/200%/300% of the Key Energy limit will be deducted according to the number of repetitions, which may make the Key Energy become negative.

- Brand New Wallet (Star Chapter): Draw 2 cards after using Silver Key Awakening.
- Misag Badge (Star Chapter): Gain 2 computing power after using Silver Key Awakening.
- Laurel Leaf Cufflinks (Star Chapter): After using Silver Key Awakening, all awakened bodies gain 15 Madness.
- Butterfly Specimen (Star Chapter): Gain a certain shield after using Silver Key Awakening.

**[Star Chapter·Spiritual Plasticity]**

In "Forgetfulness", we introduced "Crazy Omen" to make the development materials still useful in the later stages of the game, and to continuously make the awakened body stronger. In order to provide a new and strong growth experience in "Star Chapter" and every future chapter, and at the same time, we hope not to form too high a development burden in the future. For this reason, we introduced the development content that can only be effective in "Star Chapter"——"Spiritual Plasticity".

- **General Effect**: Each awakened entity will have a new talent "Spiritual Shaping Adaptability" to learn. When it reaches the maximum level, the awakened entity will gain 500 points when the spiritual awakening is played.
- **Unique Effect**: With the continuous update of "Star Chapter", the "Spiritual Shaping Adaptability" of individual awakened entities may be individually added with other enhanced abilities.
- **Dream Preparation**: The materials for learning and improving "Spiritual Shaping Adaptability" of "Dream Preparation" can be obtained from Dream Dive.
- **Effective Range**: Please note that the talent "Spiritual Shaping Adaptability" is only effective in the "Star Chapter" level.

We also added a creation upgrade mechanism to give you more growth opportunities when you have a lot of Black Seals. We removed awakenings from the usual process to ensure the uniqueness of "Silver Key Awakening" and give you more opportunities to get more creations by saving exploration resources.

- **Faded Bones**: Replaces "Contact Point" in "Forgotten" as the main encounter for restoring life in the level. Compared to "Contact Point", you cannot awaken the awakened body here.
- Burial: This option will restore 50% of your lost life and gain 1000 Silver Key Energy.
- Prayer: This option allows you to gain 1 random condition and get 1 of 3 random silver creations.
- **Ashes**: Replaces "Melt Scar" in "Forgotten" as the main encounter for purchasing creations in the level. Compared to "Melt Scar", you cannot sell command cards and awakenings here.

- **Spectral Resonance**: R Fate Wheel "Favor", "Sucking", "Active", "Exile", "Emergence", "Frenzy", "Gluttony" are no longer effective in the relevant levels due to the changes in the characteristics of "Star Chapter". These Fate Wheels will be uniformly changed to "Spectral Resonance" after entering the level, making it more likely that the wearer's exclusive creation will appear.
- **Investigation Action**: The new investigation action levels in "Star Chapter" usually no longer have exploration maps, but are replaced by a series of encounter routes. The gameplay process is more streamlined and faster.

【Ode to the God King】

Increase the madness gained at the start of battle from 16/19/22/25 to 20/30/40/50.

【The Most Precious Collection】

Added effect: Each time the wearer triggers the Transition effect, the wearer's final damage caused in this round is increased by 3/4/5/6%, up to 3 layers.

【In the Name of the Rose】

The embryo fusion gained by the wearer when devouring an embryo is increased from 11/14/17/20% to 16/19/22/25%.

【Overcoming Pain】

Shield increased from 3.5/4/4.5/5% of maximum health to 5/6/7/8%.

【Lily】

Immortal Flower on the Mud: Increases poisoning caused by 150%.
Psychic Awakening- Mucus Gathering: Increases poisoning caused by 50%.
Black Swamp Forbidden Area: Increase poisoning caused by 100%.
Retribution Strike: This damage receives a 5x strength bonus, and if poisoning is triggered by a critical hit, it is adjusted to 100%.
Inspiration 3-Never Forget: Endurance gained is increased from 5% to 10%.

【Daffodil】

Thousand Faces of Illusion-Computing Power Consumption 0: Poisoning with an additional 50% damage.
Thousand Faces Illusion - Calculation Power Consumption 2: Increases base damage by 33%, and deals a temporary counterattack with an additional 50% damage.
Thousand Faces Illusion - Calculation Power Consumption 4: Increases base damage by 50%, and increases strength multiplier from 5 to 8.
【Sorrel】

Powerful Dance: Adjusts the life recovery effect to after the round ends, the same as the Pearl Egg.
Powerful Dance: Infinite Devouring Effect adds "This Powerful Dance Restores +10 Health Points".
Rose Beauty: Adjusts the life recovery effect to after the round ends, the same as the Pearl Egg.
Spiritual Awakening 1- Stream: Adds a new effect, if the current health is less than 50%, the basic "defense" causes 2 shields, and embryo fusion +10%.

【Tulu】

Talent-God King Power: Now every 1 point of madness recharge level will also make "Strike" receive an additional 5% strength bonus, and "Abyss Command" will receive an additional 15% strength bonus. The effects of "Strike" and "Defense" when discarded no longer require Inspiration 2 to trigger. When all command cards are discarded, the effect of Command 1 tentacle attack is transferred to the talent.
Madness Burst-Star Right Moment: Adjusted from 76 temporary tentacle damage to 61 temporary tentacle damage and strength, and the actual temporary tentacle damage is 20% higher than before.
Resurrection of the Snake: Adjusted from 61 temporary tentacle damage to 46 temporary tentacle damage and strength, and the actual temporary tentacle damage is 13% higher than before. If the current posture is "Sea of ​​Tranquility", all enemies' strength is reduced by 48 points in this round.
Awakening-Immortal Majesty: Tulu gains 5 tentacle damage when consuming 1 computing power. Adjusted to 4 tentacle damage and strength, and the actual temporary tentacle damage is 20% higher than before. Now this effect is also triggered once every time a Tulu command card is discarded.
Inspiration 2-Touch of Resurgence: "Strike" and "Defense" also increase Tulu's attack power by 8% of temporary strength, and the actual temporary tentacle damage effect is increased by 50%.

As the one-year mark has come and gone, many Secret Keepers have been concerned about when and how the old Limited Evocations and Fate Chakras will be added to the Resident Evocations in the past. We have already prepared a specific plan, and we will also add the permanent evocations about one year after the first launch according to the original evocation instructions.

However, due to capacity constraints and the game's long term business plan, we need more room to make arrangements and adjustments, so we will not be committing to the possibility of replicating or adding resident evocations to new evocations after V2.0 or the exact timing.

We have also received a lot of feedback from Secret Keepers about the overflow of wakeups. In order to address this issue over a longer period of time, we will be providing more room for personality deepening and Fate Wheel stacking in V2.0, consuming a lot of material but bringing only a minor boost. This tweak is mostly in the hopes of making the overflow resources always useful in some way.

Finally, we're also raising the level cap for Secret Keepers and adding more Ramona's Debris rewards to ensure that Secret Keeper experience is always of some use.

Please note that all of these are only prospective effects in current development, and we will likely make further adjustments in subsequent development tests, so please refer to the announcements when they are live.

[Awakening

The following Evocations will have a lower probability of appearing in their respective “Realm Study” Resident Evocations after the corresponding dates, and these once-limited Evocations are still unobtainable through “Protoplasm Paradise”.
Evocation “Tulu”: January 27, 9:00pm.
Evocation “Lily”: February 10th at 9:00pm.
Awakened Body: February 24th, 9:00pm.
In the future, more Limited Evocations may be added to the “Realm Study” Resident Evocation with the release of the new version, and they will share 0.5% of the combined SSR Evocation rate in the same Realm Evocation.

The following Fate Wheels will have a lower probability of appearing in the “Phase of Reincarnation” Resident Evocation after the corresponding date, and these former Limited Fate Wheels are still not available for directional selection, nor can they be obtained through the “Book of Reincarnation”.
Fate wheel “Ode to the God King”: January 27, 9:00pm.
Fate wheel “Across Pain”: February 10, 9:00pm.
Fate wheel “Name of the Rose”: February 24, 9:00pm.
In the future, more Limited Fate Wheels may be added with version updates, and they will share 0.5% of the combined SSR Fate Wheel rate in the “Phase of Reincarnation” awakening.

Starting with V2.0, newly released Limited Characters and Fate Wheels will no longer have a set time to enter the Resident Evocation and Revival. However, previously released Limited Characters and Fate Wheels will still enter the Resident Evocation roughly one year after their initial release, as originally planned. It is still possible for the character to be revived in the future after entering the Resident Evocation, thus providing a more certain chance of obtaining the character again.

Personality Deepening

All Evocations can be deepened for the 13th~20th time, and the amount of character deepening materials consumed will increase with the number of times they are deepened, providing only a small amount of advanced attribute bonuses.
Overflowed Evocations will be retroactively returned as Evocative Body Fragments after maintenance, and the corresponding transformed materials will be deducted. Deduct “Spirit Core Fragment” x1 for each returned fragment.

Fate Wheel Stacking

All Fate Wheels can be stacked for the 13th~20th time, and the amount of extra stacking materials consumed will increase with the number of deepening times, providing only a small amount of advanced attribute bonuses.
When 16 SSR Lifewheels of the same name have been obtained, the SSR Lifewheels with the same name that have been broken down will be returned to their corresponding Lifewheels after maintenance, and the corresponding materials obtained from breaking them down will be deducted. For each wheel returned, “Spirit Core Fragment” x1 and “Rose Gold Ticket” x10000 will be deducted.
When you have obtained 16 SR Fate Wheels of the same name, the SR Fate Wheels of the same name will be returned to their corresponding Fate Wheels after maintenance, and the corresponding materials obtained from disassembling will be deducted. Deduct “Rose Gold Coupon” x4000 for each wheel returned.

Secret Keeper Level

The upper limit of Secret Keeper level has been increased to 100.
When the Handbook's Handler Level reaches 82, 84, 86, 88, 92, 94, 96, 98, you will be rewarded with 2 / 3 / 4 / 5 / 6 / 7 / 8 / 9 “Fragments of Ramona” respectively.
The “Ramona Fragments” that were missed in the past will be reissued after the maintenance.

It's been a long time since the rewards for Deep Dive, Phase Game, and Molten Scourge have been changed, and everyone's strength has improved so much in the meantime that it's no longer appropriate to do so.

In V2.0, we will first add one-time career bonuses to Phantom Dive and Phase Match, so that everyone will be more motivated to progress towards higher scores.

We're also introducing new rewards for the 375 Special Training Value in the Flood Zone, which will deepen the Evocation's Psychic Knowledge to a higher level. This will make the challenge even more rewarding. Of course, we are also introducing V-Alerts as a new honorable challenge goal.

We will continue to carefully review the challenge, rewards, and play pressure of each play style, and hope that all types of keepers will find the right level of enjoyment in the game. As a result, we've also downgraded the difficulty of Investigative Actions and expanded the role of Muscle Memory. Making the play episodes less difficult will also reduce the amount of time spent on the weekly challenge of the Transcendent Presence or when trying to fast-track through the lower difficulty Phantasmagoria Deep Dive.

Please note that these contents are only prospective effects in the current development, and we will likely make further adjustments in subsequent development tests, so please refer to the announcement of the actual installation for specific details.

[Phantom Deep Dive

Added new career rewards for 15000~30000 scores, up to a maximum of “Silver Core” x2700, “Memorial Quill” x300, “Bead of Melting Erosion” x15000.
The scoring rules have been changed to accommodate the changes in the game system.
The scoring item for “Walking in a Deep Dream” has been adjusted to award 250/500/750/1000 points for defeating the leader within 11/10/9/8 rounds.
Adjusted the scoring for “Searching for Realities” to 250/500/750/1000 points for having 5/6/7/8 creations.
Removed the “Edge of Life and Death” score, no longer requiring a death resistance trigger.
Added a new “Sleepwalker” rating item that reduces the investigation score by 20% for each use of Muscle Memory, and multiplies it for multiple triggers.

Deepening Spiritual Knowledge

All Evocation Bodies can perform the 6th~10th Spiritual Knowledge Deepening, each time consuming “Essence Primordial Spirit Core” x1 and “Primordial Spirit Core” x1.
You can obtain “Pieces of Essence Spiritual Core” from the reward of the higher score of the Flood Zone, and every 25 of them can be synthesized into “Pieces of Essence Primordial Spiritual Core”.

[Zone of Meltdown

Added a new Level V Alert for the Disaster Molten Sanctuary, with a recommended level of 75~79 and a rewarded training value of 70~90.
New 355~375 special training value rewards, totaling “Essence Primordial Spirit Core Fragment” x15, “Rose Gold Coupon” x500000.

Investigative Action

With the elimination of the Shadow of the Beginning, the recommended level of the “Normal Difficulty” levels from Chapter 6 to the final chapter of “Operation Investigation” has been lowered from 51~70 to 51~60, and enemy life has been lowered by up to 28%, and enemy damage has been lowered by up to 22%.

Muscle Memory

When using Muscle Memory to skip normal battles in “Deep Dive” and “Transcendent Existence”, the life lost has been reduced from 30% to 20% of maximum life. It is now possible to skip elites, but you will lose 40% of your maximum life.

We've been paying close attention to your feedback and appreciate the constructive discussion. After further research, we have made adjustments to some of the combat rules for Floods and Chapters to further mitigate the negative experiences these rules can cause and to provide more positive experiences that can be utilized in a positive way. We will be further testing these changes in subsequent development efforts.

Please note that these are only prospective effects in current development, and we will likely make further adjustments in subsequent development tests, so please refer to the announcement when they are live.

[Level Chapter - Star Chapter

Command Frenzy (before changes): If you play 10 Command Cards in a single turn, you gain 1 Tier of Frenzy for each Command Card played. “Frenzy” causes each Command Card played during the turn to lose 2% of its maximum life, and the Evocation gains 5 Frenzy points, which can be stacked.
Command Frenzy (changed): If you play 10 Command Cards in a turn, you gain 1 Tier of Frenzy for each Command Card you play. “Frenzy of Command” causes each Command Card played during the turn to cost +1 Counters, and the Evoker it belongs to gains 8 Frenzy when it does so, which can be stacked.
Death Resistance (before changes): When Exploration begins, Death Resistance is reduced by 300%. Each time Death Resistance is triggered, put an additional Silver Key Sunbeam into your hand.
Death Resistance (after changes): Death Resistance is reduced by up to 300% at the start of a quest, and each 1% reduction increases Maximum Life by 0.05%. Each time Death Resistance is triggered, put an additional “Silver Key Flicker” into your hand. When “Silver Key Flicker” is played, choose 1 of 3 random key orders to release.

Molten Tide - Molten Destruction

High Dimensional Insight (before changes): After a certain percentage of damage is dealt to the leader in each turn, the leader is immune to this overflow damage and reduces the damage dealt to subsequent damage dealt in the current turn by 50%, halving our Strike Rate and Strike Damage for the current turn. The first 3 damage dealt to the Chieftain per turn is increased by 100%.
High Dimensional Insight (changed): When the leader takes a certain percentage of damage per turn, he is immune to this overflow and reduces the damage he takes in the rest of the turn by 50%, halving our Strike Rate and Strike Damage for the turn. The first 5 damage dealt to the leader per turn is increased by 50%.
Prismatic Lens (before changes): Our Poison, Counter, and Bleed effects based on damage dealt will no longer be affected by Strike Damage bonuses. All Poison, Counter, and Bleed effects dealt by us are increased by 20%.
Prismatic Lens (changed): Poison, Counter, and Bleed effects dealt by Evocation based on damage dealt will no longer be affected by Strike Damage Bonus. All Poison, Counter, and Bleed effects dealt by the Evoker are increased by 15% to the Strike Rate attribute and 10% to the Strike Damage attribute.

Among these, V2.0, as previously mentioned, has a shorter duration and doesn't include new Awakened Ones or new storylines. It is a systemic transitional version, with the main content being realm mixing.

Starting from V2.1, each version will release the new main storyline of the Star Chapter, as well as a new Awakened One who appeared in previous PVs (promotional videos).

From V2.2 onwards, the team's production capacity should improve with each version; in the latter half of each version, we will add an as-yet-unannounced new Awakened One and their corresponding Consciousness Dive.

【PV (Promotional Video)】

Producing PVs is extremely challenging for our currently nearly reorganized team; we cannot guarantee that every version will have one, but we will do our utmost to make it happen. Occasionally, we may adopt entirely new forms of media to replace them; we hope everyone will like them.

【Gameplay】

Throughout the basic gameplay of V2.X, we will continuously add new General Constructs, Realm Constructs, and Exclusive Constructs, and even want to try Dual-Realm Constructs to create combination effects of different realm characteristics.

We will also constantly review the balance of the new environment, striving to give each Awakened One an opportunity to appear and have tactical significance.

If time permits, we will also explore gameplay similar to Guild Cooperative Combat (GVE), considering it as a periodically open event to bring new cooperative combat experiences and fun.

【Collection】

We will try to introduce a small number of Awakened One skins at certain times; although the number is limited and may not cover all Awakened Ones, every beginning brings hope.

We will also provide an opportunity to randomly obtain past limited expressions and avatars. Even if you missed previous events, you will have a chance to gradually collect them.

In the Archive, we will open up music, gradually adding the game's original soundtracks. A portion will be unlocked in Normal Mode, another portion in Hard Mode, and the final portion in Reality Starting Point Mode, providing more collection elements.

【Others】

Currently, the game's performance issues are indeed becoming more and more severe: interface responses are slow, gameplay becomes increasingly laggy, and each update requires downloading around 200MB of patches... We plan to gradually optimize these problems over several versions.

【Events】

We will occasionally try to introduce some entirely new forms of events, such as collaborations with other games, more festive activities, etc. Perhaps before long, everyone will be able to beat up the School Cat in the game to vent accumulated emotions and earn rewards!

The above is just a small part of our to-do list. In the first year of operation, due to various reasons and uncertainties, I was unable to communicate longer-term plans with everyone. But now we are fortunate to have the opportunity for such long-term planning, and we will cherish it as much as we can. If you have other ideas about content you'd like to see in the game in the future, please feel free to leave a message and let us know!
